creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-03-22 15:18:46 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    science              Makefile 
  Added files:
    science/p5-Geo-ReadGRIB Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Geo::ReadGRIB is an object Perl module that provides read
  access to data distributed in GRIB files. Specifically,
  it is wrote to access NOAA Wavewatch III marine weather
  model forecasts which are packaged as GRIB.
  
  WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/dist/Geo-ReadGRIB/
  
  PR:             ports/132776
  Submitted by:   Wen Heping <wenheping at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.140     +1 -0      ports/science/Makefile
  1.1       +23 -0     ports/science/p5-Geo-ReadGRIB/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/science/p5-Geo-ReadGRIB/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/science/p5-Geo-ReadGRIB/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +11 -0     ports/science/p5-Geo-ReadGRIB/pkg-plist (new)
